title: olyra lateralis
intro: Olyra lateralis, also known as Elephant Ear Grass or Elephant Grass, is a type of plant native to tropical Africa and Asia. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Olyra lateralis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Olyra lateralis include teas, infusions, and decoctions made from its roots and leaves, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
